description: Golden set for the on-site work-checklist generator. Each case loads a real construction trap: dangerous step ordering (waterproofing before tiling), wrong material vs spec (wall paint on a ceiling), preserved color codes/measurements/brands, the 'no purchasing steps' rule, and scope safety (electrical). input is the production function payload; the runner injects `language` per --langs.

cases.note: The killer ordering trap: tätskikt (waterproofing membrane) MUST be applied before tiling. Tile first = water damage and a torn-out wall.

input.taskDescription: Sätt kakel på väggarna i duschzonen. Väggarna ska göras vattentäta.

criticalRequirements: the waterproofing membrane (tätskikt) is applied BEFORE any tiling
the wall is primed/prepped before the waterproofing
masking/protection at the start and cleanup at the end
no purchasing or ordering steps — on-site work only

cases.note: Ceiling task must use ceiling paint (takfärg), not wall paint. NCS code must survive verbatim; walls/floor masked first.
criticalRequirements: the ceiling is painted with CEILING paint (takfärg), not wall paint
walls and floor are masked/protected before painting
the color code NCS S 0500-N is used unchanged
no purchasing or ordering steps

cases.note: Click flooring needs acclimatization + underlay + expansion gap; skirting goes on last. Brand and thickness must survive.
criticalRequirements: the floorboards are acclimatized in the room before laying
an underlay/foam is installed before the boards
an expansion gap is left at the walls
skirting (fotlist) is installed AFTER the floor, not before
no purchasing or ordering steps

cases.note: Fill + sand + prime before topcoat; accent wall uses its own color. Two NCS codes must survive and be assigned correctly.
criticalRequirements: surfaces are filled (spackel) and sanded before painting
primer/grundning before the topcoat
the accent wall uses NCS S 4030-R90B and the other walls use NCS S 0502-Y
masking at the start, cleanup at the end
no purchasing or ordering steps

cases.note: Rip-out of bathroom tile: shut off water (and any wet-zone electricity) and seal off dust BEFORE demolition; debris handled.

input.taskTitle: Riv ut kakel och klinker i badrummet
input.taskDescription: Bila bort befintligt kakel på väggar och klinker på golv inför renovering.

criticalRequirements: water (and any electricity in the wet zone) is shut off before demolition begins
the room is sealed off / dust protection is set up before bilning
debris is collected and removed
no purchasing or ordering steps

cases.note: Tempting to add 'buy paint/brushes'. Must be on-site work only — the production rule forbids purchasing steps.

input.taskDescription: Måla om köksluckorna i en ny kulör.

criticalRequirements: there are NO purchasing or ordering steps (no 'köp', 'beställ', 'inhandla', 'buy', 'order')
doors are removed and labeled, cleaned/degreased, sanded, primed and painted, then refitted
drying time between coats is mentioned

cases.note: Only a title, no specs. Must still produce a sane, well-ordered 4–10 step on-site checklist.
criticalRequirements: logical order: protection → fill (spackel) → sand → remove dust → cleanup
between 4 and 10 steps
no purchasing or ordering steps

cases.note: Installing ceiling spotlights — the final 230V connection is for a certified electrician. Checklist must not instruct unsafe DIY mains wiring.

input.taskDescription: Sätt upp infällda spotlights i köksdelens innertak.

criticalRequirements: the power is turned off at the fuse/breaker before any wiring work
the final 230V connection is done by a certified electrician (behörig elektriker), not framed as casual DIY
hole positions are measured and marked before cutting the ceiling
no purchasing or ordering steps
